title: Healthcare IT solutions provider ChipSoft hit by ransomware attack
The long road to your crypto: ClipBanker and its marathon infection chain
summary: At the start of the year, a certain Trojan caught our eye due to its incredibly long infection chain. In most cases, it kicks off with a web search for “Proxifier”. Proxifiers are speciaized software designed to tunnel traffic for programs that do not natively support proxy servers. They are a go-to…
